title: Height Difference Filter Feature
description: 'minecraft:height_difference_filter_feature' filters away positions based on the heightmap around the placement position.The filter will check for surface blocks in each cardinal direction within the `search_radius`. Each block will be checked against all given conditions.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

places_feature.description: Named reference of feature to be placed.

min_required_upward_height_diff.description: Optional. Specifies the minimum height difference required upwards.

min_required_downward_height_diff.description: Optional. Specifies the minimum height difference required downwards.

max_allowed_upward_height_diff.description: Optional. Specifies the maximum height difference allowed upwards.

max_allowed_downward_height_diff.description: Optional. Specifies the maximum height difference allowed downwards.

search_radius.description: 'search_radius' specifies the the length in each cardinal direction the filter will check for blocks against the given differences.
